title: Aftermarket Parts and Services
entry_mechanism: NIDLP-KAEC automotive cluster development with international partner
executive_summary:
Saudi Arabia's automotive aftermarket — parts replacement, maintenance, repair, and customisation for 10+ million registered vehicles — is worth $8–12 billion annually, dominated by foreign brands and grey market imports. Node AU-6 targets Saudi-owned aftermarket parts distribution and service networks that capture this value in-Kingdom through NIDLP-supported Saudi aftermarket company development.

The global automotive aftermarket parts and services market is growing in line with the overall automotive industry. Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 automotive programme creates immediate domestic demand anchored by Saudi OEM assembly and the 10M+ vehicle installed base.
